Gate(s): GATE-001; GATE-002; GATE-003; GATE-004; GATE-005; GATE-006
Purpose / prompt: Walk the six open gates and confirm everyone understands what proof is required before any gate can close.
Required evidence to open item: Launch Gates; Gate Evidence Checklist; NEXT-30-DAYS.md
Decision boundary: Orientation only; no gate status changes.
Output to record: Shared gate sequence and evidence boundaries.
Notes: Start here before assigning dates or reviewers.

Purpose / prompt: Agree which information must stay out of shared trackers and which artifacts are safe for role-only coordination.
Required evidence to open item: Privacy rules in Leadership Review Schedule, Outputs and HUMAN-REVIEW-REQUIRED.md
Decision boundary: Do not copy private names, contact details, participant data, medical details or financial account data.
Output to record: Privacy boundary summary for the review cycle.
Notes: Use role names, not personal details.

Purpose / prompt: Confirm the order for owner, governance, reviewer assignment, pilot, data, access and publication sessions.
Required evidence to open item: Leadership Review Schedule; Leadership Review Outputs
Decision boundary: May choose order and roles only; dates and approvals remain pending until recorded.
Output to record: Agreed review order and next-session owners.
Notes: Record output in OUT-001.

Purpose / prompt: Confirm who may inspect private source evidence for owner nominations without copying source names into the shared tracker.
Required evidence to open item: Owner Evidence Review; Owner Appointment and Authority Packet
Decision boundary: No names move to Leader Roster until programme-owner confirmation.
Notes: Use role-only notes in shared surfaces.

Purpose / prompt: Identify candidate owner roles and backup coverage gaps for each required Journey role.
Required evidence to open item: Owner Appointment Routing; Leader Roster
Decision boundary: Candidate names require approved fields and authority confirmation.
Output to record: Candidate nomination and backup gap summary.
Notes: Record detailed names only in authorized locations.

Purpose / prompt: Decide which routing rows are ready for programme-owner confirmation and which need more evidence.
Required evidence to open item: Owner Appointment Routing; Gate Evidence Checklist EVID-001 through EVID-003
Decision boundary: Do not mark GATE-001 complete from this meeting alone.
Notes: Record output in OUT-002.

Purpose / prompt: Review proposed final authority roles, operating owner roles and escalation paths.
Required evidence to open item: Governance Authority Review; DEC-003; Human Review HR-005
Decision boundary: Authority remains draft until programme governance authority records approval.
Notes: Prepares HR-005 only.

Purpose / prompt: Identify any missing escalation owner, approval role or condition that would block role authority.
Required evidence to open item: Governance Authority Review; Decisions
Decision boundary: May record gaps and required changes only.
Notes: Do not close HR-005 unless authorized reviewer completes sign-off.

Purpose / prompt: Decide which evidence rows or decisions need updating after the authority discussion.
Required evidence to open item: Gate Evidence Checklist EVID-003 and EVID-008; Leadership Review Outputs OUT-003
Decision boundary: Evidence can be linked; approval still requires authorized sign-off.
Notes: Record output in OUT-003.

Purpose / prompt: Confirm qualified reviewer role needed for HR-001 through HR-007 and whether a reviewer has authority to sign off.
Required evidence to open item: Human Review Routing; HUMAN-REVIEW-REQUIRED.md; review packet folder
Decision boundary: Do not record private reviewer contact details in shared tracker.
Output to record: Reviewer role assignments and packet routing status.
Notes: Names require authorized entry.

Purpose / prompt: Confirm which review gates must be completed before pilot, real-data replacement, access decision or production publication.
Required evidence to open item: Human Review; Launch Gates; Website Publication Gate Checklist
Decision boundary: Can define dependencies only; review decisions remain open.
Output to record: Review dependency order and target-due placeholders.
Notes: Use the routing tab before Human Review sign-off fields.

Purpose / prompt: Confirm packet links, outcome evidence fields and conditions fields are ready for qualified reviewers.
Required evidence to open item: Human Review!H4:N11; review packet folder; Gate Evidence Checklist EVID-004 through EVID-010
Decision boundary: Packet readiness is not final approval.
Output to record: Packet routing updates and unresolved reviewer gaps.
Notes: Record output in OUT-004.

Purpose / prompt: Define the smallest leadership-team pilot that can test the packs, trackers and decision flow.
Required evidence to open item: Pilot Cycle Plan; Pilot Run Sheet and Debrief Packet
Decision boundary: Planning only; pilot has not run.
Notes: Keep participant/private data out of the plan.

Purpose / prompt: Agree what observations must be logged to prove the pilot found unclear steps, duplicated work, missing resources and unnecessary fields.
Required evidence to open item: Pilot Log; Gate Evidence Checklist EVID-011 through EVID-014
Decision boundary: Do not log participant, medical, financial or private personal data.
Output to record: Pilot evidence rules and log categories.
Notes: Record output in OUT-005.

Purpose / prompt: Decide which minimum preflight checks must be complete before the pilot can be run.
Required evidence to open item: Pilot Cycle Plan PIL-001 through PIL-003; Event Readiness
Decision boundary: Readiness threshold may be recorded; pilot remains pending until actually run.
Notes: Do not mark GATE-003 complete.

Purpose / prompt: Review logged pilot observations and distinguish process issues from content or approval issues.
Required evidence to open item: Pilot Log; Pilot Cycle Plan PIL-004 through PIL-009
Decision boundary: Cannot run until a real pilot has produced observations.
Notes: Do not invent pilot evidence.

Purpose / prompt: Decide which pilot changes are accepted, require review, or should be deferred.
Required evidence to open item: Pilot Cycle Plan PIL-010 through PIL-012; Leadership Review Outputs OUT-006
Decision boundary: Only approved process changes may update templates; content approvals still require review gates.
Notes: Record output in OUT-006 after pilot.

Purpose / prompt: Check whether the evidence is enough to update GATE-003 or whether another pilot/change loop is required.
Required evidence to open item: Gate Evidence Checklist EVID-011 through EVID-014; Launch Gates GATE-003
Decision boundary: Closure still requires recorded proof, not meeting sentiment.
Output to record: Pilot closure evidence decision or next loop.
Notes: No gate closure without evidence.

Purpose / prompt: Confirm who can approve replacement of synthetic examples with real local information.
Required evidence to open item: Restricted Data Replacement Checklist; DEC-005; TASK-014
Decision boundary: No restricted data is migrated from this agenda item.
Output to record: Data-owner approval path or required changes.
Notes: Least-privilege locations only.

Purpose / prompt: Review which real local fields are necessary and which can remain synthetic, blank or withheld.
Required evidence to open item: Restricted checklist; privacy/data rules; Gate Evidence Checklist EVID-015 through EVID-017
Decision boundary: Do not add private details to shared agenda, schedule or output rows.
Output to record: Minimum field list and withheld-data rationale.
Notes: Record output in OUT-007.

Purpose / prompt: Confirm where approved local data will live and which access group controls each location.
Required evidence to open item: Data Replacement folder; Resource Library Index Access Groups
Decision boundary: Can record storage plan only; migration requires approval.
Notes: Keep restricted data out of public/prototype surfaces.

Purpose / prompt: Compare leaders-only, partly public plus protected leader area, and public information plus authenticated operational tools.
Required evidence to open item: Website Access Review; Website Access Model Decision Brief; DEC-004
Decision boundary: No production sharing or publication decision from option review alone.
Notes: Record output in OUT-008 only after authority decision.

Purpose / prompt: Review each website area and confirm public, protected, restricted or withheld treatment.
Required evidence to open item: Website Access Review rows; prototype Access view
Decision boundary: Can recommend access treatment; final approval belongs to authority.
Output to record: Area access decisions or required changes.
Notes: No Alpha assets copied.

Purpose / prompt: Capture conditions that must be resolved before production website build/publish can proceed.
Required evidence to open item: Website Publication Gate Checklist; Gate Evidence Checklist EVID-018 through EVID-020
Decision boundary: Conditions do not authorize production publishing.
Output to record: Website access conditions and follow-up owners.
Notes: Keep production blocked until DEC-004 closes.

Purpose / prompt: Check access model, operating authority, content review and copyright boundaries before any production go/no-go conversation.
Required evidence to open item: DEC-004; DEC-006; HR-005; HR-007; Event Readiness; publication checklist
Decision boundary: Blocked until prerequisite approvals exist.
Notes: Do not run while GATE-005, HR-005 or HR-007 are open.

Purpose / prompt: Confirm content, copyright, access, data and operational risks that must be controlled before launch.
Required evidence to open item: Website Publication Gate Checklist; Website Access Review; Human Review outcomes
Decision boundary: Risk review cannot substitute for final authority approval.
Notes: No production deployment from this prototype.

Purpose / prompt: If prerequisites are approved, record production go, conditional go or no-go and the evidence link.
Required evidence to open item: Leadership Review Outputs OUT-009; DEC-006; deployment record
Decision boundary: Only authorized production publishing authority can approve launch.
Notes: Keep blocked until all prerequisite approvals are recorded.
